summary: Control Plane UI testing complete. All backend APIs (14/14 tests) and frontend UI components verified working. The Control Plane page loads at /control-plane with 3 tabs: Trace (lookup), Saglik (health), Canli (live feed). Trace tab successfully fetches and displays timeline for test external_id HR-VERIFY-1774179036 with 4 events, status badge, gap warnings, and expandable metadata. Health tab shows health score (85/B), metric cards, and pipeline depth. Live Feed tab shows last 50 events with auto-refresh toggle.
critical_code_review_comments: Control Plane page correctly uses axios with baseURL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL

All data-testid attributes properly set for testing: control-plane-page, tab-lookup, tab-health, tab-feed, lookup-search-input, lookup-search-button, trace-result, trace-header, trace-status-badge, trace-timeline, timeline-event-{n}, timeline-detail-{n}, gap-warnings, system-health, health-score-card, metric-import-success, metric-sync-success, metric-outbox-pending, metric-failures, pipeline-depth, live-feed, toggle-auto-refresh, refresh-feed-button, feed-event-{n}
Timeline events are expandable and show metadata JSON correctly
Gap warnings section correctly displays missing stages from expected sequence
Health tab auto-refreshes every 30 seconds as specified
Live Feed tab has auto-refresh toggle and manual refresh button
ROOM OK/ROOM FAIL badges correctly displayed on validated events based on room_mapped metadata
Raw Payload button visible on webhook_received events for debugging
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: HR-VERIFY-1774179036 (hotelrunner), EXELY-VERIFY-1774178996 (exely)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Control Plane UI is fully functional. Test file test_controlplane_ui_api.py covers all 3 tabs' backend APIs. Frontend uses shadcn/ui components (Tabs, Input, Button, Badge, Card, ScrollArea, Skeleton). Navigation accessible from Kanallar dropdown. Key test external_id: HR-VERIFY-1774179036 has 4 timeline events (webhook_received, deduplicated, normalized, validated) from hotelrunner provider.

trace_tab.status_badge: Works - shows PROCESSING/CONFIRMED/FAILED/DUPLICATE based on timeline
trace_tab.timeline_events: Works - displays stages with timestamps and success/failure icons
trace_tab.expandable_events: Works - shows metadata JSON when clicked
trace_tab.room_badges: Works - shows ROOM OK/ROOM FAIL on validated events

health_tab.metric_cards: Works - Import Basari, Sync Basari, Outbox Bekleyen, Hatalar

live_feed_tab.event_list: Works - shows last 50 events with columns: Zaman, Stage, External ID, Provider, Durum
live_feed_tab.failure_highlighting: Works - failure events would be highlighted (none in current data)

navigation.kanallar_dropdown: Works - Control Plane accessible from Kanallar dropdown in nav
